positive: A stylized, vintage-inspired celestial tapestry featuring a majestic constellation of stylized mythical beasts—a soaring griffin, a playful fox, and a serene owl—connected by luminous, swirling nebula dust and delicate starry lines. The design should be highly symmetrical and centered, creating a bold, striking emblem suitable for a shirt print. The color palette must be limited to deep indigo blues, burnt gold yellows, creamy ivory whites, and pops of emerald green, achieving a gothic and whimsical mood. Style: Art Deco illustration mixed with sacred geometry linework. Composition: Isolated artwork on a clean white background. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow coming from the constellations themselves. Print-friendly: Bold, crisp lines and areas of solid color fill.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, photographic, realistic, monochrome, messy, dirty, cropped, artifacts
